Traphase-All Pick Mode Battle Replay

Sylvester（101304101）
Sacred Bleeding Heart, Aigis, Ramona, Pollux, Doll
Manor Echoes, Incalculable Factor, Twisted Knight Ballad, Rewinding Time, Pale Descendant
---------------VS----------------
Beelzebub（101111644）
Bone-Chilling Embrace, Corposant, Caecus, Tinct, Ogier
The Mountains' Resolve, Epiphany, Will Unyielding, Critical Point, Core Meltdown

9242d0ac-23e2-30f7-8cec-0a6b167bd00f#P#nSyBP

I never thought I'd win. Pollux's 3-cost heal saved me genuinely
I tried many different combos trying to get kath ramona to be more consistent after the nerfs but failed 😔. So I moved to poison 1 shot like everyone else
